message:
feat(core): add vendored casr IR types for cross-agent session resume integration

Introduces casr_types.rs (561 lines) with local mirrors of the
cross_agent_session_resumer canonical IR types. These are designed for
subprocess communication — parsing JSON output from casr resume, casr
list, and casr providers — without a hard compile-time dependency on
the casr crate.

Adds the "session-resume" feature gate in Cargo.toml (no extra deps,
just a compilation flag) and registers the module in lib.rs behind
#[cfg(feature = "session-resume")].

Types include:
- AgentSession: provider-agnostic session representation
- SessionProvider/ProviderCapabilities: discovery and capability metadata
- ResumeContext/ResumeStrategy: session continuation planning
- MessageRole/SessionMessage: conversation transcript modeling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -400,6 +400,8 @@ redis-session = [
     "dep:fr-expire",
     "dep:fr-persist",
 ]
+# Feature gate for cross_agent_session_resumer integration (vendored IR types).
+session-resume = []
 
 # Optional heavy integrations - feature-gated (internal)
 frankenterm-deps = ["dep:codec", "dep:config", "dep:mux", "dep:frankenterm-term"]
